import urllib.request
import socket

# Check if can reach our file server
try:
    socket.setdefaulttimeout(10)
    r = urllib.request.urlopen("http://151.247.219.40:8000/", timeout=10)
    status = r.status
    content = r.read()[:100]
except Exception as e:
    status = str(e)[:100]
    content = ""

result = f"status={status}, content={content[:50]}"
